title: MemirZabri's BoraLo Mod [Mini]
description: This mod is a scaled down version of MemirZabri's BoraLo Mod, combining only the most popular content to make you feel like you're in BoraLo's video!
body:
This mod requires [MixinBooter](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixinbooter), [MorePlayerModels](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-player-models) and [ElectroBlob's Wizardry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/electroblobs-wizardry). The mod will not work without installing these mods.

- **PDW Gun:** With the PDW gun, you can shoot any creature you can think of, and you can also reload your gun with redstone!
- **Stone Converterer:** Thanks to Stone Converter, you can turn any player or entity you want into stone like Medusa, take it to your inventory and drop it wherever you want.
- **Fallen Block:** Stepping on a Fallen Block can have devastating consequences; it attaches to your body like venom, immobilizing you. You can escape this by using the VoidMultiTool or burning yourself in fire.
- **Harkos Staff:** With the Staff of Harkos, you can put any player you want into the grave.
- **Hyperoxin:** Once you drink the bottle of Hyperoxin you will gain incredible powers!

Please note that all of these have been minimized and to get the best experience you are requested to download the full version of BoraLo Mod.



If you are wondering how to do these, you can check out [my channel](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Jo2jpVvnixo&list=PLDydmkHD_1aA3tQBBA6r4CTMsifV6aXqg), I have explained in Turkish how to make all the items in this mod via MCreator on [my channel](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Jo2jpVvnixo&list=PLDydmkHD_1aA3tQBBA6r4CTMsifV6aXqg).
